heading: Definitions
label: 198 Definitions
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Livestock Mandatory Reporting note set out under .section 942 of Pub. L. 106–78section 1635 of this title
Termination DateSection to terminate , see , set out in a Livestock Mandatory Reporting note under .Mar. 14, 2025section 942 of Pub. L. 106–78section 1635 of this title

children.heading: Market
children.label: 1 Market
children.text: The term “market” means the sale or disposition of swine, pork, or pork products in commerce.

children.heading: Packer
children.label: 2 Packer
children.text: The term “packer” has the meaning given the term in .section 1635i of this title

children.heading: Pork
children.label: 3 Pork
children.text: The term “pork” means the meat of a porcine animal.

children.heading: Pork product
children.label: 4 Pork product
children.text: The term “pork product” means a product or byproduct produced or processed in whole or in part from pork.

children.heading: State
children.label: 5 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the 50 States.

children.heading: Swine
children.label: 6 Swine
children.text: The term “swine” means a porcine animal raised to be a feeder pig, raised for seedstock, or raised for slaughter.

children.label: A
children.text: the mechanism used to determine the base price for swine committed to a packer, grouped into practicable classifications by the Secretary (including swine or pork market formula purchases, other market formula purchases, and other purchase arrangements); and

children.label: B
children.text: the presence or absence of an accrual account or ledger that must be repaid by the producer or packer that receives the benefit of the contract pricing mechanism in relation to negotiated prices.

children.heading: Other terms
children.label: 8 Other terms
children.text: Except as provided in this part, a term has the meaning given the term in section 1635a or 1635i of this title.
